title: Your Article Title Here
excerpt: A compelling one or two sentence description of your article.
body:
Start writing your article here.

Use \n\n (backslash-n-backslash-n) to create a new paragraph.

## This Creates a Section Heading

Articles often have multiple sections. Use ## headings to organize your piece.

### This Creates a Smaller Subheading

For sub-sections within a section.

> This is a quote or blockquote. Great for memorable quotes or key ideas.

## Adding Media

To add an image:

[IMAGE: images/your-image-name.jpg]
[CAPTION: Optional caption describing the image.]

To add a video:

[VIDEO: videos/your-video-name.mp4]

## Publishing Checklist

Remember to:
1. Save this as a new file with a simple name (like my-great-article.json)
2. Add the filename to the ARTICLE_FILES list in js/main.js
3. Set 'featured': true if you want it on the homepage
4. Add your cover image to the images folder
5. Delete these instructions and write your own content!
